title: Video by fit_4_football
description:
⚽️THE LOSERS TALK ABOUT THE WINNERS⚽️

Speaking to a group of students recently about the LOSERS talking about the WINNERS! It has always been the way! Now you must ask yourself the question which one are you and which one are you acting like! ⚽️

Focus on yourself and winning! Everything else is just noise! ⚽️

#footballdrills #socceracademy #footballacademy #footballtraining #soccerelite
